package rulecoverage

func NegativeGoroutineCapturesLoopVariable() string {
    ruleID := "goroutine_captures_loop_variable"
    family := "security"
    severity := "warning"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "`for _, v := range items { go func() { use(v) }() }` without rebinding `v` inside the loop body (pre-Go 1.22)"
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
